title: JeffersonWM site-wide save checkpoint
content:
This checkpoint was a cleanup and handoff pass before a broader site-wide save. The practical focus was Perihelion: finishing the thumbnail deployment loop, syncing the runtime Python script, and making sure the public notes and cross-computer handoff trail matched the code we now have in place.

What was confirmed:

  • Perihelion runtime synced: the updated thumbnail-capable Python service was recopied to the shared runtime script location and re-verified so the live/local process can be restarted against the current backend logic.
  • Navigation polish: the Perihelion wordmark at the top left now links back to the app root, which makes it easier to jump home after browsing folders or shared views.
  • Public status stayed aligned: JeffersonWM Home was checked against the current saved app versions, and Perihelion remains correctly labeled at v1.4.2 without needing an extra version bump just for this sync pass.
  • Cross-machine notes updated: the shared actions handoff files were refreshed so the other workstation and the next save point both inherit the current state instead of the pre-thumbnail notes.

No new UI branch was introduced here; this was the kind of maintenance checkpoint that keeps the platform understandable while the bigger app work continues.
